[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)

- Description: Places API cost diagnostic + iteration session (Cloud Monitoring + bootstrap + iterative review)
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/go_to_market/pull/103
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/pull/88
  
  Details:
  Diagnostic + iteration time on the Places API cost reduction work above and beyond the per-PR logs. Includes: enabling Cloud Monitoring + Cloud Billing APIs on get-data-io via Service Usage API (pre-cleared by Gary's one-click enable), querying the metric for today's per-method Place Details breakdown (11,211 calls vs 600 rows = 18.7 calls/place), iterative review with operator on each refinement (Hosts Circles + email → Warm-up needed; photo retirement scope; rescue-rejected default; cache definitive negatives; bootstrap from sheet data), running the bootstrap script live (665+ cache records being written via Contents API at ~50/min), and writing the canonical PLACES_API_CACHING.md reference doc. The total iteration loop spanned ~7 PR merges (TrueSightDAO/go_to_market #99 #100 #101 #102 #103 + agentic_ai_context #88) with operator feedback shaping each one.
